patch.value: TELEMETRY_SCHEMA_VERSION=1 is hardcoded and stamped on every event with no documented upgrade protocol; becomes a reliability risk if the event structure must change.

ADR documents the negotiation protocol; queue entries carry client_schema_version distinct from event schema_version; endpoint probe parses an advertised server max-version header; tests assert schema_version on all 3 event types; no v1 behavior change.
TELEMETRY_SCHEMA_VERSION=1 is hardcoded and stamped on every event with no documented upgrade protocol; becomes a reliability risk if the event structure must change.
